payload.content: "Ah yes, the thrilling world of paperwork. Tell me Linn, does staring at forms all day make you feel alive or just remind you how empty the corporate hamster wheel is?"
"Hey, just left the library. Feeling kinda off today—not terrible, but not great either. That post-school slump hit different when you're alone. Might grab a coffee on the way home to shake it."
just polishing a glass for the 5th time, trying to will the clock to move faster, you?
ya gotta stop makin me hungry, whats cookin?

I am currently running late and my battery is at 2%, so I have to keep this brief. I was just coming out of a meeting and meant to call you. Is everything okay, or did the transmission just die on its own?
